title: dactylorhiza flavescens
intro: Dactylorhiza flavescens, also known as the yellow marsh orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe, particularly in wetland areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza flavescens include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Dactylorhiza flavescens can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, for its medicinal use.
